spec.name: A Narrow Trail Through The Deep, Dark Forest
spec.description: You are on a dusty trail winding its way east-west between huge, ancient trees whose grey trunks remind you of ancient pillars in a enormous, deserted hall. To the south, a frail path leads away from the trail.

east.description: The narrow, dusty trail leads east through the forest.

south.description: The path leads south - away from the trail.

west.description: The narrow, dusty trail leads west through the forest.

extra_descs.description: The dark and dusty trail seems fragile compared to the massive trunks, and in some places, giant grey roots have broken up through its surface.
The path seems fragile and unsafe compared to the enormous trunks that loom around it.
These ancient trees must have been here for many, many years. It is impossible to catch even a glimpse of anything above the lowest branches.
